content:
Build a toolbar with grouped buttons using Nuxt UI components.

Requirements:

1. Create a toolbar with 3 button groups:
   - **Text formatting group**: Bold, Italic, Underline buttons with appropriate Lucide icons
   - **Alignment group**: Left, Center, Right align buttons with icons
   - **Actions group**: A "Save" button with label + a dropdown chevron button
2. Group each set of related buttons together so they appear visually connected (no gaps between buttons in the same group)
3. Use `variant="outline"` and `color="neutral"` for all buttons
4. The groups should support different sizes — use `size="sm"` for the formatting group and default size for others
5. Add a vertical orientation group as well (e.g., a sidebar with stacked navigation buttons)

Focus on correct Nuxt UI v4 component usage for grouping buttons together.

message.content:
Build a toolbar with grouped buttons using Nuxt UI components.

Requirements:

1. Create a toolbar with 3 button groups:
   - **Text formatting group**: Bold, Italic, Underline buttons with appropriate Lucide icons
   - **Alignment group**: Left, Center, Right align buttons with icons
   - **Actions group**: A "Save" button with label + a dropdown chevron button
2. Group each set of related buttons together so they appear visually connected (no gaps between buttons in the same group)
3. Use `variant="outline"` and `color="neutral"` for all buttons
4. The groups should support different sizes — use `size="sm"` for the formatting group and default size for others
5. Add a vertical orientation group as well (e.g., a sidebar with stacked navigation buttons)

Focus on correct Nuxt UI v4 component usage for grouping buttons together.

# Documentation References

The libraries in this project may have APIs and patterns that differ from your training data.
**Always read the relevant documentation before writing code.**

## @nuxt/ui v4

> **WARNING:** This version may differ from your training data.
> Read the docs in `NUXT_UI_DOCS.md` before writing any @nuxt/ui-related code.
> Heed deprecation notices and breaking changes.

- **Version**: `4` — use `"^4"` in package.json (NOT older major versions)
- Documentation: `NUXT_UI_DOCS.md`
<!-- END:ask-docs-auto-generated -->

2518:### Renamed ButtonGroup

2521-
2522-```diff
2523-<template>
2524:- <UButtonGroup>
2525-+ <UFieldGroup>

2527-    <UButton icon="i-lucide-chevron-down" />
2528-+ </UFieldGroup>
2529:- </UButtonGroup>
2530-</template>
2531-```

32427-## Changelog
32428-
32429-See commit history for \[component]\(https\://github.com/nuxt/ui/commits/v4/src/runtime/components/Error.vue) and \[theme]\(https\://github.com/nuxt/ui/commits/v4/src/theme/error.ts).
32430-
32431-
32432:# FieldGroup
32433-
32434-## Usage
32435-
32436:Wrap multiple [Button](https://ui.nuxt.com/components/button) within a FieldGroup to group them together.
32437-
32438-```vue
32439-<template>
32440:  <UFieldGroup>
32441-    <UButton color="neutral" variant="subtle" label="Button" />
32442-    <UButton color="neutral" variant="outline" icon="i-lucide-chevron-down" />
32443:  </UFieldGroup>
32444-</template>
32445-```
32446-
32447-### Size
32448-
32449-Use the `size` prop to change the size of all the buttons.
32450-
32451-```vue
32452-<template>
32453:  <UFieldGroup size="xl">
32454-    <UButton color="neutral" variant="subtle" label="Button" />
32455-    <UButton color="neutral" variant="outline" icon="i-lucide-chevron-down" />
32456:  </UFieldGroup>
32457-</template>
32458-```
32459-
32460-### Orientation
32461-
32462-Use the `orientation` prop to change the orientation of the buttons. Defaults to `horizontal`.
32463-
32464-```vue
32465-<template>
32466:  <UFieldGroup orientation="vertical">
32467-    <UButton color="neutral" variant="subtle" label="Submit" />
32468-    <UButton color="neutral" variant="outline" label="Cancel" />
32469:  </UFieldGroup>
32470-</template>
32471-```
32472-
32473-## Examples
32474-
32475-### With input
32476-
32477-You can use components like [Input](https://ui.nuxt.com/components/input), [InputMenu](https://ui.nuxt.com/components/input-menu), [Select](https://ui.nuxt.com/components/select) [SelectMenu](https://ui.nuxt.com/components/select-menu), etc. within a field group.
32478-
32479-```vue
32480-<template>
32481:  <UFieldGroup>
32482-    <UInput color="neutral" variant="outline" placeholder="Enter token" />
32483-
32484-    <UButton color="neutral" variant="subtle" icon="i-lucide-clipboard" />
32485:  </UFieldGroup>
32486-</template>
32487-```
32488-
32489-### With tooltip
32490-
32491-You can use a [Tooltip](https://ui.nuxt.com/components/tooltip) within a field group.
32492-
32493:```vue [FieldGroupTooltipExample.vue]
32494-<template>
32495:  <UFieldGroup>
32496-    <UInput color="neutral" variant="outline" placeholder="Enter token" />
32497-
